title: epic_fight_X_iceandfire
description: The project is an epic fight animation of the Ice and Fire weapons
body:
I animated some of the weapons in the Ice and Fire mod for the Epic fight mod
- Note!!!
Required Items:
1. ice and fire:[https://modrinth.com/mod/ice-and-fire-dragons](https://modrinth.com/mod/ice-and-fire-dragons)
2. epic fight:[https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight)
